overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in traditional red clothing walking up a mountain trail at night. The character traverses from open grassland into rocky terrain, encounters a small animal, and approaches a cliff edge with a view of distant mountains under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the dirt path through tall grass on an open hillside

entered.detail: winding gravel and dirt trail leading uphill through the grass
tall green grass flanking the left side of the path
tall green grass flanking the right side of the path
large rocky hill formation visible in the distance on the right
dark blue night sky scattered with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking up an open mountain trail at night. The path winds through tall grass with a large rock formation visible in the distance on the right, under a clear starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with stone formations

events.description: terrain transitions from open grassland to rocky path with large stone formations emerging on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing up the trail as the path becomes more enclosed by rocky outcrops

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky cliffs appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as rocky formations emerge on both sides. The character walks through a semi-covered rocky passage with large boulders flanking the path, while the sky becomes partially obscured by the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage approaching cliff overlook

events.description: small fox-like animal appears sitting on the path ahead
path approaches cliff edge revealing distant mountain vista and valley below

agents.ego_description: walking past a small animal and approaching the cliff edge with expansive views

notable_agents.action: small reddish fox-like creature sitting on the path before moving aside as the character approaches

entered.detail: steep cliff drop-off on the left side revealing the landscape below
mountain range visible in the far distance beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky passage and encounters a small fox-like animal on the path. After passing the animal, the trail approaches a cliff edge on the left, revealing a stunning view of distant mountains and valleys under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail at night that transforms from an open grassland into a narrow rocky passage and finally a scenic cliffside. It begins with the character walking through tall grass under a clear starry sky, with a large rock formation visible in the distance. As the path winds forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting into a semi-covered passage flanked by large boulders that partially obscure the sky. The scene then tightens into a narrow rocky corridor where the character encounters a small fox-like animal before the terrain suddenly opens up. Finally, the trail reaches a cliff edge on the left, revealing a sweeping view of distant mountains and valleys beneath the night sky.
